operational_scenes.scene_title: AGB Removal Guidelines and Customer Interaction
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain do's and don'ts regarding AGB removal and customer guidance
operational_intents: Communicate restrictions on removing AGB from Geek
Advise directing customers to use AVEVA or hospital
Clarify control and information flow when removing boxes
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract rules and customer interaction protocols
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focus on operational restrictions and customer guidance

operational_scenes.scene_title: Cell Selection and QR Code Usage
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe cell selection and interpretation of QR codes
operational_intents: Explain how to view QR code by selecting cells
Identify special cells as stations with workstation IDs
Demonstrate use of cell codes for operator instructions
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract cell code identification and operator communication methods
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Clarify cell and QR code operational usage

operational_scenes.scene_title: Load and Unload Direction Nodes Overview
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain load and unload direction nodes and their operational impact
operational_intents: Clarify design issues related to load/unload directions
Describe unload direction allowing only AGVs without totes
Introduce concept of load direction activation
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract operational constraints and design considerations
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Separate design issues from support responsibilities

operational_scenes.scene_title: AGV Access Between Cells Based on Tote Status
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Detail AGV movement permissions between cells based on tote presence
operational_intents: Explain access rules for AGVs with and without totes
Discuss cell code uniqueness and related data structures
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract movement rules and data interpretation
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Clarify AGV access control and cell code meaning

operational_scenes.scene_title: Workstation ID and Node Code Details
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain workstation ID visibility and node code relevance
operational_intents: Show how to identify workstation IDs on cells
Clarify which geek-related data is operationally relevant
Discuss default values and their significance
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract workstation identification and data filtering methods

operational_scenes.scene_title: Charger Selection and Manual AGV Charging Procedures
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe charger selection features and manual charging process
operational_intents: Identify charger status and associated robot
Explain disabling/enabling chargers in RMS and Geek
Outline manual intervention for low battery AGVs
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract charger management and manual override procedures
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Highlight critical charging operations and controls
